title: Visual Traveler's Titles
body:
## Visual Traveler's Titles

The project adds handmade dimension logos with replacing standard fonts

## Languages

**Czech** (cs_cz) **Chinese** (zh_ch, zh_hk, zh_tw) **Dutch** (nl_nl) **English** (en_us) **French** (fr_fr) **German** (de_de, de_ch) **Greek** (el_gr) **Indonesian** (id_id) **Italian** (it_it) **Japanese** (ja_jp) **Korean** (ko_kr) **Polish** (pl_pl) **Portuguese** (pt_pt, pt_br, pt_ao) **Romanian** (ro_ro) **Slovak** (sk_sk) **Ukrainian** (uk_ua) **Spanish** (es_es, es_ar, es_cl, es_ec, es_mx, es_uy, es_ve) **Vietnamese** (vi_vn)

### Legacy

**English** (en_us) **Ukrainian** (uk_ua)

![Crowdin](https://badges.crowdin.net/visual-travelers-titles/localized.svg)

you can help with the translation or suggest a new language for translation

## Compatibility

**Minecraft** (Overworld, The End, The Nether) **Ad Astra** (Glacio, Mars, Mercury, Moon, Venus) **Beyond Earth** (Deimos, Glacio, Mars, Mercury, Moon, Phobos, Venus) **Galacticraft** (Asteroid, Moon, Venus) **Stellaris** (Mars, Mercury, Moon, Venus) **Create: Northstar** (Mars, Mercury, Moon, Venus) **Tropicraft** (Tropics) **The Aether** (Aether) **Twlight Forest** (Twlight Forest)

## Preferences

You can choose the version you want to play with or play with both,
just make sure they are in the same order
![Versions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/039e15ddf61e2311b1526be87f1335a61bf5af86.png)

Visual Titles - translations on most languages, when Legacy with a very large number of mods

**In the mod settings you can Turn Off the shadows for a better look**
![Dimensions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c658637d440153d9ca7c9ea4d5eb8a25de0487f.png)

**You can do the same with biomes**
![Biomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3ad8dc56d21f72112cb259d92fa4620a4b686d9.png)

## Terms of use

You may modify Visual Traveler's Titles for your own use, but not distribute it. You are still free to create add-ons for Visual Traveler's Titles, as long as you do not use the original original files and textures. Don't re-upload any copy of Visual Traveler's Titles.

## 

If you find any bug or have any other issues, please let me know
